what_it_does: This file is a channel-memory ledger entry that records metadata for a single design-assets icon image named 'image (17)1'.
observations: YAML-frontmatter ledger entry with no body content
Represents an image/png asset in the design-assets channel
Recorded width and height are both 0
Version is 1 with a single version record
Author session and timestamps are present
standouts: Image dimensions are 0x0 despite being an image/png asset
Asset name contains spaces and parentheses
concerns: Zero width/height suggests image metadata may not have been extracted correctly
Filename includes spaces and parentheses which can complicate addressing
notes: A stub metadata record for a design-assets icon image with missing dimension and alt-text data.
questions: Why are the width and height recorded as 0?

purpose_vs_actual: The file appears intended to catalog a versioned icon asset; it does so, but with incomplete image metadata and no descriptive alt text.
intention_signals: To create a persistent, addressable ledger record for a design-assets icon image so it can be referenced by id, address, and blob.
contribution: Provides a versioned, addressable metadata record for a specific icon asset, including its blob reference, channel, provenance, and creation timestamp.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory ledger entry for the design-assets icon 'image (17)1', an image/png asset with zero recorded dimensions, version 1, empty alt text, and no links.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and version a design-assets icon image for later reference by its addressable blob and channel path.
